#lang roulette/example/disrupt

(define (make-bayesian-node dep1 dep2 row col)
  (define label (string-append "row: " (number->string row) ", col: " (number->string col)))
  (define node (if (and dep1 dep2) 
                   (flip 0.5 #:label (string-append label " (true)")) 
                   (flip 0.4 #:label (string-append label " (false)"))))
  node)


(define (n-grid-bayesian n)
  (last
   (last
    (for*/fold ([grid (list)])
               ([row (in-range 1 n 1)]
                [col (in-range 1 n 1)])
      (if (< (length grid) row) ; create a new row and append (first node in a new row)
          (append grid (list (list (make-bayesian-node
                                    #t 
                                    (if (= row 1)
                                        #t 
                                        (first (list-ref grid (- row 2))))
                                    row
                                    col))))
          (for/list ([cur-row grid])
            (if (< (length cur-row) col)
                (append
                 cur-row
                 (list (make-bayesian-node
                        (list-ref     (list-ref grid (- row 1)) (- col 2))
                        (if (= row 1)
                            #t
                            (list-ref (list-ref grid (- row 2)) (- col 1)))
                        row
                        col)))
                cur-row)))))))

(define out (n-grid-bayesian 15))
(printf "Total symbolic variable count: ~a\n" (length (symbolics out)))
(define profiler-results (profile out
                                  #:timeout 1
                                  #:iterations 1
                                  #:samples 3
                                  #:specialize-amt 200))
(save-results profiler-results "results.json" "test.rkt")

(define labels (process-results profiler-results))
;labels
;(guided-sample out labels #:take 150)
